data.title: A certain address spent about $750,000 to build a position of 49,140.07 HYPE on Hyperliquid
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to HyperInsight monitoring, a newly created address established a position of 49,140.07 HYPE on Hyperliquid, with an average purchase price of US$15.2, spending approximately US$750,000.

data.title: Opinion: After Trump entered the White House, investors turned to traditional "doomsday assets" gold and evacuated BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Zach Burks, CEO and founder of NFT service provider Mintology, said: "Since Trump took office in the White House, many investors have regarded Bitcoin as a high-risk asset class for the first time and have withdrawn from Bitcoin. It no longer plays the role of storing value. As many people return to the original'doomsday assets', it is not surprising that gold prices have soared as tariffs and grenades continue to be thrown in the free world." (Coindesk)

data.title: Thailand SEC Recognizes Tether's USDT As Approved Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to Odaily, the Thailand Securities and Exchange Commission has officially recognized Tether's stablecoin USDT as an approved cryptocurrency. This decision marks a significant milestone in the development of digital assets in the region and represents an important step in clarifying and strengthening Thailand's regulatory framework. The recognition of USDT is expected to provide investors with greater flexibility and choice, while also promoting a more dynamic and resilient industry. By facilitating the seamless integration of USDT, this move supports the diversification and modernization of Thailand's financial landscape.

data.title: LBank will list Bubblemaps (BMT)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch Bubblemaps (BMT) at 20:00 (SGT) on March 11, and open the BMT/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 20:00 on March 12.

data.title: ECB plans to launch digital euro in October, but lawmakers voice concerns
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The president of the European Central Bank said that once legislation is in place, the European Central Bank plans to issue a digital euro by October 2025. Members of the European Central Bank’s board of directors are “collaborating” with relevant stakeholders to promote the implementation of the digital euro, but some legislators expressed doubts. (Coindesk)

data.title: Strategy files for $21 billion in preferred stock offering
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) applied to issue preferred shares to raise $21 billion. The issuance is intended to raise funds for general purposes, including potential Bitcoin acquisitions. It is reported that Strategy Inc. has submitted a prospectus and intends to continue its strategy of accumulating Bitcoin, using proceeds from equity, debt financing and operating cash flow. The document does not mention any new Bitcoin acquisitions, but emphasizes the company's continued commitment to its Bitcoin strategy.

data.title: Thai regulator recognizes Tether stablecoin USDT as approved cryptocurrency
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Securities and Exchange Commission of Thailand has identified Tether's stablecoin USDT as an approved cryptocurrency. This move marks a key moment in the development of digital assets in the region and an important step in clarifying and strengthening Thailand's regulatory framework. It will provide investors with greater flexibility and choices while promoting a more dynamic and resilient industry. By enabling seamless integration of USDT, the decision supports the diversification and modernization of Thailand's financial landscape.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Remains Unaffected Despite White House Summit
data.description: According to PANews, Matrixport's latest report indicates that the recent White House cryptocurrency summit and the confirmation of the U.S. strategic Bitcoin reserve have failed to ignite market enthusiasm. The cryptocurrency market has not seen a significant rise, with perpetual contract funding rates remaining in single-digit levels. This suggests that retail investor interest remains subdued, contrasting sharply with April and December 2024, when funding rates surged to double-digit highs. Even the market momentum brought by U.S. President Donald Trump's official inauguration has been relatively muted, clearly indicating that Bitcoin requires more impactful catalysts to initiate a new upward trend.

data.title: IOST: Binance and other exchanges will support the upcoming airdrop, and the snapshot is planned to be taken on March 15
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The IOST Foundation announced that Binance, Upbit, BitKub, Coincheck, OKJ, BITPOINT and CoinTrade will support the upcoming airdrop. It is reported that the total airdrop allocation is 852.8 million IOST tokens. Users must hold at least 1,000 IOST tokens in their accounts on participating exchanges. The snapshot time is 00:00 UTC on March 15.

data.title: Bitget Wallet announces native integration of L1 blockchain Berachain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 wallet Bitget Wallet announced that it has natively integrated the L1 blockchain Berachain, becoming the first wallet to deeply support the network. Users can access the Berachain mainnet through Bitget Wallet, manage and transfer ecological currencies, view K-line market and transaction data, and capture more trading opportunities through flash exchange and cross-chain functions. Berachain is an EVM-compatible Layer 1 blockchain that uses a liquidity proof (PoL) consensus mechanism to dynamically adjust validator incentives. Bitget Wallet and Berachain plan to launch the Berachain ecological event on March 19.
